name: all-benchmarks-single-node-large
description: Single-node large-size study for the full benchmark suite. This experiment answers how CARTS compares to OpenMP on one node, whether it scales with thread count, and whether any wins or losses correlate with hardware-counter or thread-level EDT behavior.

steps.name: thread-sweep
steps.description: Primary single-node scaling study. Compare ARTS against OpenMP across a bounded power-of-two thread sweep up to the local 16-thread profile to identify the scaling knee and any regressions before oversubscription dominates.

steps.name: perf-single-node
steps.description: Single-node hardware-counter study at the full local-thread configuration. Use this to explain ARTS vs OpenMP timing differences through cache-reference and cache-miss behavior.

steps.name: thread-edt-single-node
steps.description: Single-node runtime-structure study at the full local-thread configuration. Capture thread-level EDT activity to explain whether scaling limits come from runtime scheduling balance rather than raw kernel work.
